creator: mark.roszko@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Joerg Wunsch from comment #13)
We don't run CI on macOS. Instead we have this beast to deal with what can be summed up as "Apple hates anything that isn't swift these days"

https://gitlab.com/kicad/packaging/kicad-mac-builder

Otherwise we do have compiler flags and such stashed in the main CMakeList
https://gitlab.com/kicad/code/kicad/-/blob/master/CMakeLists.txt#L366
